title: KGROTE 100PCS Self Adhesive Cable Clips, Sticky Wire Tidy Hooks, Adhesive Management Holder for Organiser Wall, Desk, Home and Office (Transparent, Small)
features: Self Adhesive Cable Clips: Made of high-quality PC plastic and strong adhesive, strong and durable. No drilling is required for use, no residue is left behind, and the surface will not be damaged. Set contains 100 cable clips, cable clips size: 16x15x8mm.

Multi-Purpose Wire Clips: Our self-adhesive cable clips are not only for cable management, but also help you decorate your Halloween, Thanksgiving and Christmas lights easily. They are used to store and manage different types of cables: Ethernet cable, USB cable, HDMI cable, TV cable, etc. Widely used in home, garden, garage and office.

Easy to Use: Just peel off the protective film and stick the wire clips for electrical wires on a flat and dry surface without screws or tools, our wire holder clips will organise your clutter wires neatly and tidily. These finisher wire clamp cable clips also work well on table, metal, walls, plastics, glass, wood surface.

Note Before Use: Clean the surfaces before attaching the wire clips to ensure that the mounting surfaces are free of dirt, dust, grease and wax. Stick it on and press firmly for 10 seconds, and use them after 2 hours for maximum adhesion.
description: Product Description Suitable for a variety of different clean interfaces！ HOW TO USE THE CABLE CLIPS? Available in three colors and two sizes！！！ Clear Clips 1.Size： Small：1.5*1.6*0.8cm/0.59*0.63*0.31″ Medium：1.85*2*1.1cm/0.72*0.78*0.43″ 2.Maximum applicable wire size： Small：0-5mm Medium：0-8mm 3.Quantities:60 pcs/100 pcs White Clips Size： Small：1.5*1.5*0.9cm/0.59*0.59*0.35″ Medium：1.9*1.9*1.2cm/0.74*0.74*0.47″ 2.Maximum applicable wire size： Small：0-5mm Medium：0-8mm 3.Quantities:60 pcs/100 pcs Black Clips Size： Small：1.5*1.5*0.9cm/0.59*0.59*0.35″ Medium：1.9*1.9*1.2cm/0.74*0.74*0.47″ 2.Maximum applicable wire size： Small：0-5mm Medium：0-8mm 3.Quantities:60 pcs/100 pcs 100 Pcs Cable Clips 100 Pcs Cable Clips 100 Pcs Cable Clips 60 Pcs Cable Clips 60 Pcs Cable Clips Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 1,452 4.3 out of 5 stars 1,452 4.3 out of 5 stars 1,452 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,373 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,373 Price £11.39 £ 11 . 39 £10.85 £ 10 . 85 £10.85 £ 10 . 85 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 Color Clear White Black Clear White Size 20*18.5*11mm 19x19x12mm 19x19x12mm 20*18.5*11mm 19x19x12mm Quantities 100 Pcs 100 Pcs 100 Pcs 60 Pcs 60Pcs
